{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220520065E23AFA00CFB0B05B898"}"},"total":69},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582194951879525144","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以，五星给了，主角人设设定的很好，不会让人看了感觉很蠢或者很圣母，剧情也很流畅，也不是现在番茄那种大部分的AI烂书，现在番茄好书不容易找到了，难得还有自己用心写不用AI修改的作者，写的还不错的，加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765369225,"group_id":"7573914067362925630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1pLH3bgmv9EEmHEYUpmk0kXCDVWk4CJKcWfgIIZG+Al","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e815eeda1d8648b191c463f22ba2423e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707051&x-signature=iLeSEOxkEK13F1by49rn96rYqKA%3D","user_id":"2453708474423933","user_name":"一情雨梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2453708474423933","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1762068210,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573914067362925630","book_info":{"abstract":"【钓鱼】+【逆袭】+【巨物】+【发家致富】+【逆袭】+【都市种田】
"滚！带着你的破渔具一起滚！"
被前妻一家榨干最后一分钱，叶苏拖着行李箱无家可归。
一次意外中，他被神秘蝙蝠咬伤，竟觉醒【深海声呐】异能！
从此，水中世界在他眼中无所遁形！
当他从臭水沟捞出百年人参，
当他用声呐定位轻松捕获价值百万的蓝鳍金枪鱼，
当他的远洋船队垄断全球海鲜市场...
曾经鄙夷他的前妻跪舔求复合："苏哥，我知道错了！"
叶苏冷笑："早干嘛去了，晚了！"
从吃泡面到米其林三星当小饭桌，
从骑二手电驴到开私人游艇、飞机代步，
从桥洞流浪汉到会所至尊黑卡包年！
身边更是美女环绕，金发秘书、当红主播、豪门千金，
你以为这就是终点？不，他的目标是 ——
用声呐探测马里亚纳海沟，打捞史前文明宝藏！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5f3c7cadf0c1413dc9668d7e036aeb61","author":"钓鱼茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7573914067362925630","book_name":"离婚没地方住？我靠钓鱼包会所","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#78b0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7573938546789076030","read_count":"21744","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"486792"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"234","tags":"都市种田,都市,多女主,钓鱼,都市异能,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b93977d5e0da519587178bdba31f873f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312006&x-signature=dUL7SEWA9RqDlxeLYTRVn9wfPHE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220520065E23AFA00CFB0B05B898"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
